items.title: I blame this loss (and the Wolves pursuit of their 1st LVSL title) on Trey Kaufman-Renn getting ruled out due to a mouth contusion.
items.author: Leo S
items.body_excerpt:
I blame this loss (and the Wolves pursuit of their 1st LVSL title) on Trey Kaufman-Renn getting ruled out due to a mouth contusion.

Would've been our year 😔

items.title: With the 59th pick of the NBA Draft the Minnesota Timberwolves select Trey Kaufman-Renn!
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
With the 59th pick of the NBA Draft the Minnesota Timberwolves select Trey Kaufman-Renn!

The 2026 NBA Draft is LIVE on ESPN.

items.title: With Timberwolves selecting Trey Kaufman-Renn at 59 (and Braden Smith to the Pacers at 38), it's just the second time Purdue has had multiple players taken in the same NBA draft.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
With Timberwolves selecting Trey Kaufman-Renn at 59 (and Braden Smith to the Pacers at 38), it's just the second time Purdue has had multiple players taken in the same NBA draft.

First time since JaJuan Johnson & E’Twaun Moore in 2011.

media.description: Indiana doesn’t own a first- or second-round selection in the 2026 NBA Draft, but pre-draft workouts and scouting remain critical for the franchise’s future.
